name: Mandala 1
meaning: Hymns to Agni, Indra, Varuna, and other deities by various sages

name: Mandala 2
meaning: Hymns chiefly by the sage Gritsamada

name: Mandala 3
meaning: Hymns chiefly by Visvamitra, containing the Gayatri Mantra

name: Mandala 4
meaning: Hymns chiefly by Vamadeva, focusing on Agni and Indra

name: Mandala 5
meaning: Hymns chiefly by the Atri clan

name: Mandala 8
meaning: Hymns chiefly by the Kanva clan, with Pragatha strophes

name: Mandala 9
meaning: Hymns entirely dedicated to Soma Pavamana (the purified drink)

name: Mandala 10
meaning: Later hymns containing philosophical, cosmic, and marriage verses
